character_buff.name: Gatling Empowerment
character_buff.description: With your knowledge about gatling structures, you can increase the shooting power of your team members and allow yourself to build fast.

effects: For your team, the following applies:
Critical Rate, Critical Damage and Monster Damage +10%

skills.name: Detection
skills.description: Reveals invisible characters and locates hidden objects.

skills.name: Critical Disease
skills.description: Builds a trap that releases a poisonous cloud of smoke when triggered.

skills.name: Invisible String
skills.description: Set a booby trap that deals Physical Damage to enemies. (Also applicable to flying monsters.)

skills.name: Explosion
skills.description: Sets an explosive trap that blocks attacks from several enemies at the same time.

skills.name: Fence Construction
skills.description: Builds a fence that obstructs enemy movement and prevents them from advancing.

skills.name: Cannon-Turret Const.
skills.description: Constructs a cannon-turret that automatically attacks enemies.

skills.name: Safety Ward Const.
skills.description: Creates a protective ward that defends the characters within.

skills.name: Regen. Ward Const.
skills.description: Creates a regenerative ward that continuously restores the HP of characters within.

skills.name: S.C.-Turret Const.
skills.description: Builds a Siegecannon-Turret that is able to attack several enemies simultaneously.

skills.name: Fence Construction
skills.description: Builds a fence that obstructs enemy movement and prevents them from advancing.

skills.name: Spike Trap
skills.description: Constructs a trap which fires a sharp projectile.

skills.name: Rotating Blade Const.
skills.description: Manufactures a whirling sword that attacks adjacent enemies.

skills.name: Concen. Ward Const.
skills.description: Constructs a ward that increases power.

skills.name: Great RB Construction
skills.description: Manufactures a whirling sword that attacks adjacent ground and airborne enemies.

skills.name: Defensive Tool
skills.description: Builds a structure which recovers HP of nearby structures. Only 1 unit available.

levels.value: Increases structure HP recovery and frequency of recovery according to DEX stats
Increases structure HP recovery and frequency of recovery according to DEX stats

skills.name: Enhanced Rotating Blade Build
skills.description: Builds an enhanced rotating blade which can use a stronger attack. Only 3 units available.

skills.name: Detection Ward Construction
skills.description: Builds a ward which can detect nearby invisible enemy and flying enemies. Only 3 units available.

levels.value: Cancel invisible status of enemy when it detects and also inflicts [
Cancel invisible status of enemy when it detects and also inflicts [

skills.name: Electric Punisher Construction
skills.description: Builds a turret which recognizes an enemy to shoot an electronic ray of light. Only 3 unit available.

levels.value: Increases the chance to use [Electric Punisher] skill according to DEX stats
Increases the chance to use [Electric Punisher] skill according to DEX stats

skills.name: Regenerator Construction
skills.description: Builds a ward which recovers HP of nearby friendly force quickly. Only 1 unit available.

levels.value: Increases HP recovery, frequency of recovery according to DEX stats
Increases HP recovery, frequency of recovery according to DEX stats

stances.name: Ancient Tactics

skills.name: Miracle
skills.description: Execute a tactic that increases the offensive and defensive capacity of the ally.

skills.name: Protecting Booster
skills.description: Increase the defensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Shearing Booster
skills.description: Increase the offensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Bartor
skills.description: Remove all harmful effects and restore HP of all team members.

skills.name: Additional Training
skills.description: Increase skill level by enhancing own tactical capacity.

levels.value: Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.
Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 2% of extra [None]

skills.name: Charge
skills.description: Charges enemies down with a sword.

skills.name: Vertical Slash
skills.description: A powerful downward slash. It inflicts triple damage on large monsters and Double Damage on smaller ones.

skills.name: Skyliner
skills.description: Slashes across a group of enemies.

skills.name: Fury
skills.description: Maximises Attack SPD by using whole bodys energy. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Dread Worm
skills.description: Brandishes a sword in a sweeping motion, striking terror into the hearts of your enemies.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Genocide
skills.description: Advances upon enemies with 7 consecutive slashes.

skills.name: Fury
skills.description: Maximises Attack SPD by using whole bodys energy. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Sweet Dreamer
skills.description: Swing a sword in an ascending arc and drive enemies to the sky.

skills.name: Ultimate Dash
skills.description: A forceful charge that sweeps enemies away.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 5.6m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Decision
skills.description: Leaps and strikes enemies in mid-air.

stances.name: Hanging Guard

skills.name: Shell Breaker
skills.description: Can smash enemys armor easily by using the heavy weight of sword. But Attack SPD and ATK to Soft Armor decrease. Canceled, if Stance changes.

levels.value: Damage +60% to Heavy Armor, +20% Light Armor
Damage +60% to Heavy Armor, +20% Light Armor

skills.name: Carnage
skills.description: Attacks the enemy by creating a rush of rubble with the great sword.
skills.target: Up to 9 enemies 6m away and within a 5m radius

skills.name: Slaughter
skills.description: Attacks the enemy 4 times with a great sword.

skills.name: Volition
skills.description: Plunges sword into enemy while airborne.

skills.name: Ruthless
skills.description: Attacks the enemy with weight of the sword.

stances.name: Blast Guard

skills.name: Blast Preparation
skills.description: Improve your destructive power by equipping your great sword with explosives to be detonated upon launching an attack.

skills.name: Blast Voltage
skills.description: Smash the great sword onto the ground, creating an explosive shock.

skills.name: Blast Chain
skills.description: Cause a chain explosion through consecutive strikes.

skills.name: Blast Swinger
skills.description: Blast enemies away with a big swing from your great sword.
skills.target: Up to 4m away / within a radius of 5m / Max. 6 targets
